name: @nodeve/grimoire
description: Hardware + site schema/validation: agnostic equipment catalogs (Modbus device profiles, PV panels) and installation-config schemas (solar array), one source of truth projected to JSON Schema + TS types.

scripts.check: pnpm run generate && pnpm run guards && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.guards: node scripts/guard-concept-dupes.ts && node scripts/guard-feature-dupes.ts && node scripts/guard-feature-props.ts && node scripts/guard-archetype-features.ts && node scripts/guard-refs.ts && node scripts/guard-vocab-collision.ts && node scripts/guard-register-links.ts
